title: Foundation & Core Framework
items: Initial bot setup with a modular and recursive command handler.
Implemented per-server prefix system (r) with case-insensitive detection.
Added auto-healing JSON initialization for configuration persistence.
Integrated UnbelievaBoat economy with optimized Axios requests.
Launched High/Low betting game with interactive buttons.
Implemented ImageGuess (Gartic) with Pixabay and Jimp image processing.

title: Minigame Maturity & Dashboard
items: Launched the Multiplayer Host-Funded Werewolf game system.
Implemented an interactive Setup Dashboard for game masters.
Added dedicated game channel restrictions (rgamechannel).
Introduced per-game cooldowns and custom delays (rdelay).
Modernized the help system with dropdown categories and buttons.

title: Engine Stability & Deployment
items: Overhauled Werewolf engine with manual commands and team chat.
Added live skip progress logic and alive/dead player lists to embeds.
Implemented partial matching logic for more lenient ImageGuessing.
Hardened file pathing for seamless Wispbyte hosting compatibility.
Fixed interaction collisions and duplicate embed declarations.

title: Wispbyte & UX Core
items: Forced .env priority to fix 'Invalid Token' errors on Wispbyte.
Added token sanitization (trim/quote removal) for safety.
Self-healing configuration system for missing/corrupted files.
Permission-based help menu (hides admin cmds from members).

title: Werewolf: Tactical Overhaul
items: Player Indexing (1, 2, 3...) for fast targeting.
Secret DM commands for Wolves and Seers.
Tactical Vote Cancellation during the Day phase.
20% Prize Tax and Seer scan limits (default 2).

title: The Social & Logging Update
items: Collaborative 'Death Stories' for Werewolves via standalone commands.
Unified persistent DM log embeds for the Host and all Players.
Standalone DM commands (skip, wsay, how) requiring no prefix.
Winner summaries now pushed to persistent logs at endgame.

title: Persistence & Metadata
items: Migrated from Git-based 'commits' to local 'updates.json' storage.
Added support for rich, multi-line update descriptions.
Enhanced update embeds with better visibility and organization.

title: Dynamic DM Dashboard & Shorthands
items: Updated DM log embeds to show only relevant commands for your role/phase.
Added prefix-less support for 'v [ID]' (vote) and 'unvote' in DMs.
Added auto-highlighting (➡️) for the player's own name in their DM logs.
Synchronized Seer scan counts and Werewolf shortcuts across all DMs.

title: Decentralization & Performance
items: Decentralized Economy: Added per-server UnbelievaBoat linking with live API validation (rrunbtoken).
Memory Caching: Implemented global memory collections for prefixes and settings, drastically reducing disk I/O.
Robust Restrictions: Minigames now verify channel existence before blocking commands to prevent deadlocks.
Modernized UI/UX: Fixed deprecated ephemeral flags and updated technical guides with precise Bot Client ID steps.
File Cleanup: Removed redundant source files to maintain a lean and professional directory structure.

title: The Competition & Organization Update
items: New Game: Launched the 'bet' command for 50/50 PvP gambling with other users.
Help Overhaul: Consolidated all games into a single 'Minigames' category for a cleaner dropdown menu.
Categorized Help: Minigame help is now split into 'Games' and 'Game Settings' with polished descriptions.
Visual Feedback: Added 🗳️ (ballot box) icons for voters in Werewolf and improved 'Ready' visibility.
Smarter Loader: Refactored the command engine to support nested folder categorization and type tagging.
